note: All 8 sites returned HTTP 403 from WebFetch — consistent with CDN/Cloudflare edge bot-detection blocking the sandbox IP. This is NOT a confirmed outage; SSL handshakes succeeded for all 8 domains via openssl s_client, confirming servers are live. SSL WARNING: all 8 certs expire 2026-06-06 (29 days remaining — crossed the <30-day threshold today). Yesterday (2026-05-06) expiry showed as 2026-06-05 (30 days, boundary); today the cert shows 2026-06-06 at 29 days. Vercel/Let's Encrypt auto-renewal should trigger within the next 1–7 days — monitor daily.
